reviews.name: Sophia Laurent
reviews.review: An extraordinary dining experience. The Liora Mixed Grill is simply the finest charcoal grill I have tasted outside of Istanbul. The atmosphere is refined yet warm — we will absolutely be back.

reviews.name: Marcus Hoffmann
reviews.review: The Burrata Pizza is a revelation. That combination of perfectly charred crust and cool, creamy burrata is genuinely one of the best things I have eaten this year. The service matches the quality.

reviews.name: Aisha Nkrumah
reviews.review: I hosted a business dinner for eight here and LIORA exceeded every expectation. Staff were impeccable, food beautifully presented, and the lamb chops were cooked to absolute perfection.

reviews.name: James Calloway
reviews.review: The Boss Double Burger deserves its name. Two perfectly charcoal-grilled patties, extraordinary depth of flavour, and that sauce — I am still thinking about it three weeks later.

reviews.name: Elena Vassiliev
reviews.review: Brought my parents here for their anniversary. The Meze Plate was a journey through the Mediterranean — each component clearly made with real care. LIORA has become our family's special occasion restaurant.

reviews.name: Thomas Bergmann
reviews.review: The Grilled Salmon was cooked to perfection — flaky, moist, beautifully seasoned. The ambience is sophisticated without feeling stuffy. Exactly what a fine dining experience should feel like.

reviews.name: Priya Chandran
reviews.review: Exceptional quality across the board. The Hot Honey Pepperoni pizza has the perfect balance of sweet heat. LIORA clearly takes pride in every single detail — from the plating to the warm service.

reviews.name: Rafael Mendes
reviews.review: Took my wife here for our anniversary. From the moment we arrived, the experience was seamless. The Baklava and Ice Cream was the perfect ending to a truly perfect evening.
